transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_left_high (no return/debt tagging). Latch left-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_left_mid (no return/debt tagging). Latch mid left scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_right_high (no return/debt tagging). Latch right-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_right_mid (no return/debt tagging). Latch mid right scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_left_high (no return/debt tagging). Materialize high severity from a latched left source.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_right_high (no return/debt tagging). Materialize high severity from a latched right source.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_left_mid (no return/debt tagging). Materialize mid severity from a latched left source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_right_mid (no return/debt tagging). Materialize mid severity from a latched right source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_contract_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_contract_high (no return/debt tagging). Interior contraction lowers high severity to mid.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_contract_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_contract_mid (no return/debt tagging). Interior contraction lowers mid severity to zero and drops to the boundary.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics11_boundary_discharge
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics11_boundary_discharge (no return/debt tagging). Discharge latent action phase at the boundary before shell entry; this targets recurrent recovery without increasing action-rank jumps.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_boundary_to_shell
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_boundary_to_shell (no return/debt tagging). Enter the latent shell only from a discharged boundary state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_left_high (no return/debt tagging). Probe a left-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_right_high (no return/debt tagging). Probe a right-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_left_mid (no return/debt tagging). Probe a left-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_right_mid (no return/debt tagging). Probe a right-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_stage_release_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_stage_release_left (no return/debt tagging). Release staged left shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics12_shell_stage_detour_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics12_shell_stage_detour_left (no return/debt tagging). Route staged left shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics12_shell_stage_detour_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics12_shell_stage_detour_right (no return/debt tagging). Route staged right shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_stage_release_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_stage_release_right (no return/debt tagging). Release staged right shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics10_shell_probe_neutral
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics10_shell_probe_neutral (no return/debt tagging). Probe neutral shell states before interior rearm by staging a shell marker; this widens shell recurrence while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics6_shell_refresh_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics6_shell_refresh_left (no return/debt tagging). Refresh a left-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics6_shell_refresh_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics6_shell_refresh_right (no return/debt tagging). Refresh a right-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_cleared
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_cleared (no return/debt tagging). Re-arm the interior from a cleared shell state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_left (no return/debt tagging). Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a left scan latch.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_right (no return/debt tagging). Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a right scan latch.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics13_contract_mid_detour_nn
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics13_contract_mid_detour_nn (no return/debt tagging). Targeted detour for the max-chain branch: discharge mid-contraction into a neutral latch before shell routing to increase path depth without introducing action-rank increases.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics14_shell_high_rearm
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics14_shell_high_rearm (no return/debt tagging). Re-arm interior contraction for stalled high-severity shell states to recycle them into the controlled relaxation loop without increasing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics15_boundary_crossfeed_neutral
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics15_boundary_crossfeed_neutral (no return/debt tagging). Narrow boundary cross-feed detour on the max-chain bottleneck state; adds a depth step while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics16_boundary_discharge_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics16_boundary_discharge_high (no return/debt tagging). Discharge high-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics17_boundary_handoff_left_to_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics17_boundary_handoff_left_to_mid (no return/debt tagging). Narrow boundary handoff on the max-chain tail to open an extra acyclic segment without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics18_boundary_discharge_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics18_boundary_discharge_mid (no return/debt tagging). Discharge mid-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to further reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics19_tail_handoff_n0_to_nn
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics19_tail_handoff_n0_to_nn (no return/debt tagging). Single-state tail handoff on the max-depth branch: insert one extra acyclic step before the existing contract-mid discharge, preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics20_boundary_positive_discharge
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics20_boundary_positive_discharge (no return/debt tagging). Discharge positive action phase at the boundary into the shell-entry lane. This widens deterministic recurrence from the physics18/19 baseline while preserving source conservation and the current locality budget.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics21_boundary_direct_reentry_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics21_boundary_direct_reentry_mid (no return/debt tagging). Directly re-enter the interior from a mid-severity boundary state once the positive action phase is already active and the latch is cleared. This is the first explicit boundary -> interior recovery rule on the 6-register carrier.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics22_boundary_direct_reentry_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics22_boundary_direct_reentry_high (no return/debt tagging). Directly re-enter the interior from any high-severity boundary state (R3=high), leaving the action phase and latch untouched. This targets the remaining boundary terminal mass while keeping the exact V1 laws intact.

transitions.name: carrier8_action_reset_interior_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: interior state may reset positive action phase to neutral, adding recurrence without breaking locality.

transitions.name: carrier8_action_reset_interior_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: interior state may reset negative action phase to neutral, adding recurrence without breaking locality.

transitions.name: carrier8_latch_clear_interior
transitions.description: 8-register: clear positive latch inside interior to promote cycles without touching sources.

transitions.name: carrier8_latch_clear_interior_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: clear negative latch inside interior to promote cycles without touching sources.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_self_loop
transitions.description: 8-register: leave interior state unchanged (explicit self-loop) to seed recurrence without altering sources or memory.

transitions.name: carrier8_defect_pulse_return
transitions.description: 8-register: mark return-memory when interior carries positive severity; nudges curvature/perturbation structure while keeping sources fixed.

transitions.name: carrier8_defect_relax_transport
transitions.description: 8-register: tag transport/debt when interior holds negative severity; encourages divergent neighbor structure without source change.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_latch_toggle
transitions.description: 8-register: toggle latch in shell to increase neighborhood spread without touching sources/action.

transitions.name: carrier8_boundary_relax
transitions.description: 8-register: relax negative severity at boundary when transport debt is tagged; promotes curvature/perturbation diversity within locality bounds.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_shuffle_left
transitions.description: 8-register: shell state with positive latch and return memory steps into interior and clears memory; adds a small cycle to lift curvature/perturbation without touching sources/action.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_shuffle_right
transitions.description: 8-register: shell state with negative latch and return memory steps into interior and clears memory; symmetric shuffle to broaden neighbor spread.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_severity_pulse_pos_to_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: interior severity flips pos→neg when memory is neutral; injects small curvature without touching sources/action.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_severity_pulse_neg_to_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: interior severity flips neg→pos when memory is neutral; symmetric curvature pulse.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_shell_oscillate_left
transitions.description: 8-register: small interior→shell oscillation with memory clear to widen neighbor spread (left/positive latch).

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_shell_oscillate_right
transitions.description: 8-register: small interior→shell oscillation with memory clear to widen neighbor spread (right/negative latch).

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_action_toggle_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: toggle action phase inside interior when memory neutral to increase neighbor variety (pos).

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_action_toggle_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: toggle action phase inside interior when memory neutral to increase neighbor variety (neg).

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_shell_oscillate_action_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: oscillate interior→shell while dropping action to neutral and tagging return; couples severity+action change to widen curvature.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_shell_oscillate_action_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: oscillate interior→shell for negative severity/action, neutralize action, tag return; increases neighbor spread.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_return_to_interior_with_debt
transitions.description: 8-register: return from shell to interior while tagging transport/debt; creates distinct successors for curvature/perturbation while respecting locality.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_memory_split_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: split shell memory path (pos latch) with transport tag; sets up distinct successor paths.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_memory_split_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: split shell memory path (neg latch) with opposite transport tag; complementary successor path.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_return_split_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: return from shell with pos latch to interior; clears memory to keep locality bounded.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_return_split_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: return from shell with neg latch to interior; clears memory to keep locality bounded.

transitions.name: carrier8_curv_motif_a_boundary_detour
transitions.description: Curv motif A: boundary with pos severity detours to shell, flips action to +, tags return.

transitions.name: carrier8_curv_motif_b_shell_branch_pos
transitions.description: Curv motif B: branch 1 — return to interior, drop action, tag transport positive.

transitions.name: carrier8_curv_motif_b_shell_branch_neg
transitions.description: Curv motif B: branch 2 — return to interior, drop action, tag transport negative.

transitions.name: carrier8_curv_motif_c_transport_relax_pos
transitions.description: Curv motif C: resolve positive transport tag, neutralize severity to close branch 1.

transitions.name: carrier8_curv_motif_c_transport_relax_neg
transitions.description: Curv motif C: resolve negative transport tag, neutralize severity to close branch 2.

transitions.name: carrier8_boundary_detour_pos_action
transitions.description: Detour boundary -> shell with positive action and tagged return/transport (divergent branch 1).

transitions.name: carrier8_boundary_detour_neg_action
transitions.description: Detour boundary -> shell with negative action and return tag; no transport tag to reduce perturbation inflation (branch 2).

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_detour_resolve_pos
transitions.description: Resolve positive detour back to interior, clearing memory/transport (closes branch 1).

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_detour_resolve_neg
transitions.description: Resolve negative detour back to interior, clearing memory/transport to damp perturbation.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_transport_damp
transitions.description: Damp positive transport tag in interior without changing severity/action to improve perturbation nonexpansion.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_transport_damp
transitions.description: Damp positive transport tag in shell to reduce perturbation distance before interior return.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_zero_toggle_guard
transitions.description: Guard: when severity is neutral in interior, zero action/memory/transport to reduce perturbation spread.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_zero_toggle_guard
transitions.description: Guard: when severity is neutral in shell, clear action/memory/transport to narrow neighbor distances.

transitions.name: carrier8_cycle_damp_return_pos
transitions.description: Cycle-damp: when return memory is set, snap severity/action/memory/transport to neutral to reduce perturbation distance.

transitions.name: carrier8_cycle_damp_return_neg
transitions.description: Cycle-damp: symmetric damp for negative return memory.

transitions.name: carrier8_contraction_transport_pos
transitions.description: Contract positive severity toward zero when transport is positive; aims to improve perturbation nonexpansion.

transitions.name: carrier8_contraction_transport_neg
transitions.description: Contract negative severity toward zero when transport is negative; symmetric perturbation contraction.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_neighbor_average_pos
transitions.description: Shell averaging: positive severity relaxes to neutral with cleared action/memory/transport.

transitions.name: carrier8_shell_neighbor_average_neg
transitions.description: Shell averaging: negative severity relaxes to neutral with cleared action/memory/transport.

transitions.name: carrier8_snap_to_cycle_pos
transitions.description: Snap contraction: zero action, positive severity -> neutral; clears memory/transport.

transitions.name: carrier8_snap_to_cycle_neg
transitions.description: Snap contraction: zero action, negative severity -> neutral; clears memory/transport.

transitions.name: carrier8_boundary_signflip_branch
transitions.description: Boundary sign-flip branch with zeroed action/memory/transport; targets perturbation nonexpansion without adding distance via transport.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_signflip_branch
transitions.description: Interior sign-flip branch with neutral transport; paired with boundary flip to reduce perturbation deltas while keeping curvature branches.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_action_flip_pos_to_neg
transitions.description: 8-register: interior action flips pos→neg and tags return memory; injects branching while sources stay fixed.

transitions.name: carrier8_interior_action_flip_neg_to_pos
transitions.description: 8-register: interior action flips neg→pos with opposite memory tag; complementary branch for spread.
